$schema_note: Filter config applied to ALL groups in the batch. See README for field meanings.

fetchQuantity._days_note: Used when mode = BY_DAYS_COUNT. 1 = today (from 00:00). 7 = last 7 calendar days.
fetchQuantity._postsCount_note: Used when mode = BY_POST_COUNT. Hard cap on posts per group.

options._includeComments_note: Fetch comments per post. Slows down significantly.
options._commentsLimit_note: Max comments fetched per post (0 = no limit).
options._translateContent_note: Translate post content to target language (uses extension's translator).
options._generateHTML_note: Generate post.html viewable in browser. Heavy.

advanced._requestDelay_note: Delay between FB GraphQL requests. Higher = safer but slower. 0-5 recommended.
